programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. The 30-minute talk show covers a wide range of domestic and international topics, providing a balanced and critical perspective on current affairs and analysis within the framework of cross-cultural and multi-disciplinary comparisons. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: The Point with Liu Xin
programme.desc: The Point with LIU Xin is a current affairs program on CGTN. The program comments on global news through LIU Xin’s very own unique perspective. With two decades of experience as a news anchor and overseas correspondent, LIU Xin has an engaging and personal style. The Point with LIU Xin connects world audience through social media, enhancing their participation as well as offering a comprehensive perspective on world events.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. programme.title: Rediscovering China
programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. With unrivalled access to the country's people and places, the program aims to show the global audience an inclusive and vigorous China._x000D__x000D_

programme.title: The Heat
programme.desc: The Heat is a daily talk show anchored from Washington, D.C. It focuses on top stories making news globally. The Heat presents tough issues from a comprehensive, balanced and international and Chinese perspective. Guests from on the spot and around the world ensure lively debate and a range of voices. Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Rusty Derouen

programme.desc: Paul prepares his haul of winter fur for market and explores a new piece of land to call his own. Eustace builds a boat lift using massive logs and a block and tackle pulley.

programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: First Day on Sodor!
programme.desc: Darcy the tunnel boring machine makes some mistakes on her first day, but she soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do.

programme.title: Plate Escape
programme.desc: Sarah, Duck and Plate Girl find some unusual inhabitants in the Plant Section at the shop.

programme.title: Rainbow's Niece
programme.desc: Sarah's new colour wheel reminds Rainbow that he has not seen his niece in a while.

programme.title: Bell
programme.desc: The Town Hall clock is broken, it's lost its Ding Dong. It will take hours to fix, so Stanley asks noisy Fred if he will shout "DING DONG" when the big hand is pointing up.

programme.title: Bus-Train
programme.desc: Cynthia is working on the bus so asks Stanley to take her passengers to the community centre. He uses Amare's tractor and trailer, his car, a boat, and a bath to make a Bus-Train.

programme.title: Sometimes I Make Cakes
programme.desc: Flipping pancakes, baking cakes, and homemade sauce from the shops, the animals share all the things they love about cooking.

programme.title: It's Time to Bake Gingerbread Pandas
programme.desc: It's snowing outside, but JoJo and Gran Gran are cosy in the kitchen making gingerbread biscuits. JoJo knows exactly what shape to make. There's plenty of help from Ned, Monty and Jared too.

programme.title: Stickbird
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Show and Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: The Party Badge
programme.desc: Bing Bong - there's somebody at the door. It's delivery Chipmunk with a parcel for Duggee, but why is it wrapped up like a present? Maybe its Duggee's birthday!

programme.title: The Playing Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins, come to visit.

programme.title: Calm Down
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Go Jetter Heroes: Amelia Earhart
programme.desc: Inspired by her hero Amelia Earhart, Xuli attempts a solo flight across the Atlantic.

programme.title: Grapefruit
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song "All My Friends" to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: Leek
programme.desc: Leek won't let the conditions backstage stop him from singing "Can't Hold Me Down".

programme.title: Double Trouble
programme.desc: Supertato and Carrot are looking for ice and think Evil Pea has become kind by giving them some. They soon realise it's not Evil Pea after all.

programme.title: Carrot Powers Up
programme.desc: Carrot wants to become super strong, so she restores Evil Pea's robot suit for herself.

programme.title: Swap Places
programme.desc: The Teletubbies swap places in the Tubby Car and drive to the Hidey Hup. They swap places again on the Tubby Uppy Downy before going up and down.

programme.title: Scooter
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'scooter' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different scooters - a purple scooter, a blue scooter and a bopping scooter.

programme.title: Chattering Teeth
programme.desc: After accidentally causing a mini avalanche, Messy must help Lofty dig out the entrance to his cave.

programme.title: Got Your Goat
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Cricket
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Slide
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: The Shopping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Song of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Holi Festival of Colour, India
programme.desc: Glitch takes all of the colourful powder from the Festival of Colour in Dwarka, India. Can the Go Jetters get it back?

programme.title: Kids
programme.desc: A quick trip to the shops proves tricky for Dad, when Bingo and Bluey want to play a game of 'Kids'. Now Bluey is Mum, Bingo's her baby and for Dad however, he is a very naughty boy.

programme.title: Typewriter
programme.desc: Bluey, Snickers, and Winton are on their way to ask Calypso for help with their problems, when they are ambushed by the Terriers and use their unique talents to get past.

programme.title: Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Pass the Parcel
programme.desc: Lucky's Dad is outraged that modern Pass the Parcel has a present in every layer and changes the rules back to only having one prize in the middle, but Bingo is forever losing.

programme.title: Andy and the Puma Cubs
programme.desc: Andy, Jen & Scout head to Patagonia, in South America on a baby animal mission in search of mother puma and her four cubs.

programme.title: Paper Fan
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Playtime Towers, so Bella helps Lift cool down with a paper fan. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who has a flapping paper fan dance!

programme.title: The Collecting Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections.

programme.title: The Yoga Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: The River Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: Timgad Ruins, Algeria
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: The Boreal Forest, Canada
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: Rangers of the Rails
programme.desc: A bit bored by her surroundings, Emily longs to go on a fun adventure and experience something new and exciting. It's not long before her wish is granted.

programme.title: The Big Sleepover
programme.desc: The little girl and her feathery friend have a sleepover with some friends, but struggle to get to nod off.

programme.title: Decorating Donkey
programme.desc: Sarah plans a surprise for when her hibernating tortoise wakes up.

programme.title: I'm Not Even Scared of Nothing
programme.desc: Werewolves, cobras, alligators, and commando dragons! The animals chat about all the things which absolutely do not make them scared.

programme.title: It's Time for Lunar New Year
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Henry and Bonnie, who are celebrating Lunar New Year. They join them inside the art gallery to find out about Chinese traditions.

programme.title: Show and Tell
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: The Tour Guide Badge
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge!

programme.title: Master of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Tulip Fields, Netherlands
programme.desc: Is Glitch stealing tulips from the Netherlands? That's what the Go Jetters think!

programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: The Party Badge
programme.desc: Bing Bong - there's somebody at the door. It's delivery Chipmunk with a parcel for Duggee, but why is it wrapped up like a present? Maybe its Duggee's birthday!

programme.title: Master of Puppets
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Tulip Fields, Netherlands
programme.desc: Is Glitch stealing tulips from the Netherlands? That's what the Go Jetters think!

programme.title: Chilli Peppers
programme.desc: It's the bagpipe playing Chilli Peppers performing their song "We're Chilli When It's Hot"

programme.title: Grapefruit
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song "All My Friends" to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: Carrot Powers Up
programme.desc: Carrot wants to become super strong, so she restores Evil Pea's robot suit for herself.

programme.title: Swap Places
programme.desc: The Teletubbies swap places in the Tubby Car and drive to the Hidey Hup. They swap places again on the Tubby Uppy Downy before going up and down.

programme.title: Chattering Teeth
programme.desc: After accidentally causing a mini avalanche, Messy must help Lofty dig out the entrance to his cave.

programme.title: Got Your Goat
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Cricket
programme.desc: During a friendly game of neighbourhood cricket, the dads struggle to bowl Rusty out.

programme.title: Slide
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Potato Time
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Song of Peace
programme.desc: Betty recalls the first time she pushed the red button, the Squirrels explore a range of emotions with Happy, Angry Bull tells a not-so-sleepy bedtime story, and the gerbils sing.

programme.title: Holi Festival of Colour, India
programme.desc: Glitch takes all of the colourful powder from the Festival of Colour in Dwarka, India. Can the Go Jetters get it back?

programme.title: Kids
programme.desc: A quick trip to the shops proves tricky for Dad, when Bingo and Bluey want to play a game of 'Kids'. Now Bluey is Mum, Bingo's her baby and for Dad however, he is a very naughty boy.

programme.title: Housework
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Paper Fan
programme.desc: It's a hot day in Playtime Towers, so Bella helps Lift cool down with a paper fan. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who has a flapping paper fan dance!

programme.title: The Collecting Badge
programme.desc: Duggee is cleaning his biscuit tin collection, one of the many things he collects. The squirrels are inspired to make their own collections.

programme.title: The Yoga Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: The River Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: Timgad Ruins, Algeria
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit Timgad in Algeria, but someone is playing games with their click-ons.

programme.title: The Boreal Forest, Canada
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: Rangers of the Rails
programme.desc: A bit bored by her surroundings, Emily longs to go on a fun adventure and experience something new and exciting. It's not long before her wish is granted.

programme.title: The Big Sleepover
programme.desc: The little girl and her feathery friend have a sleepover with some friends, but struggle to get to nod off.

programme.title: Decorating Donkey
programme.desc: Sarah plans a surprise for when her hibernating tortoise wakes up.

programme.title: Football
programme.desc: Stanley is called to help setup a football pitch so the children can play, although he must think on his feet when the weather turns, and the players start getting wet.

programme.title: Bell
programme.desc: The Town Hall clock is broken, it's lost its Ding Dong. It will take hours to fix, so Stanley asks noisy Fred if he will shout "DING DONG" when the big hand is pointing up.

programme.title: I'm Not Even Scared of Nothing
programme.desc: Werewolves, cobras, alligators, and commando dragons! The animals chat about all the things which absolutely do not make them scared.

programme.title: It's Time for Lunar New Year
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran meet Henry and Bonnie, who are celebrating Lunar New Year. They join them inside the art gallery to find out about Chinese traditions.

programme.title: Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: The Tour Guide Badge
programme.desc: Gerbie the snake is on holiday and would like to see all the beautiful sights. Duggee can help, he does have his Tour Guide badge!

programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, there's a story told in blocks, the tale of a first tooth, a fable about changing emotions, and a yarn involving the Squirrels as puppets.

programme.title: Metro Home

programme.title: Chasing Flavors
programme.desc: Well-known Kapampangan chef, Chef Claude Tayag, probes the origins of Filipino iconic dishes from region to region, one dish at a time, and will attempt to answer what makes each dish unique and outstanding in its own right.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: BUNGA CINTA BERSEMI DI BENGKEL
programme.desc: When Fery’s (Hardy Fadillah) delivery van breaks down, he ends up in a heated argument with a female mechanic named Nabila (Naomi Zaskia). Their parents, who are old friends, notice that their children's personalities don't match traditional gender roles. To 'fix' them, they agree to a swap: Nabila must work at Fery’s flower shop, while Fery must get his hands dirty at Nabila’s garage.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Kasih Paham Bang Ilmu Bangun Rumah Tangga
programme.desc: After her sister’s passing, Jeny (Nabila Zavira) is forced to marry her brother-in-law, Ivan (Cemal Faruk). The two can't stand each other, but their families are determined to make it work, pushing them into a honeymoon and demanding they produce an heir as soon as possible.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: GURIH CINTA TELUR ASIN
programme.desc: Varrel (Dimaz Andrean) has been traumatized by salted eggs since childhood. After accidentally injuring Babeh Jali and ruining his daughter Kinara's (Yuki Kato) salted egg stock, Varrel is forced into a unique punishment: he must work for Kinara to learn the art-and the value-of the very food he fears the most.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mas Mawar Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Tama (El Ryan) is a rose seller who had to drop out of medical school after his parents went bankrupt. His life changes when he rescues Sheina (Indah Nicole), a doctor and girlfriend of a famous celebrity, after she suffers from amnesia following a tragic accident. As Tama cares for her, a beautiful bond begins to form between the fallen student and the forgotten doctor

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: LOE YANG LUV GUA YANG KEDER
programme.desc: Zeno’s (25) life shatters when he discovers that Masha, the woman he loves, is cheating on him with his own cousin, Panca. To make matters worse, Zeno learns that Panca is plotting to overthrow Zeno's father from his successful oil company to seize the director's chair for himself.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TOLONG PERMAK HATIKU
programme.desc: A traveling seamstress specializing in clothing alterations meets a handsome man during a roadside incident. Though sparks fly instantly, their romance faces a major obstacle: the man is already committed to someone else.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Halumu dan Haluku Jadi Halufyu
programme.desc: Alya’s (Callista Arum) car is blocked by Thoriq’s (Kevin Hillers) wonton cart. While looking for her boyfriend, Ozi, Alya discovers a painful truth: Ozi has been dating another woman named Hana for three years. After a public breakup at Thoriq’s stall, Alya and Thoriq grow closer, sparking a jealous rage in Hana.

programme.title: TENGKULAK KECE IDAMAN
programme.desc: Nadia (Debi Sagita) is rescued from thugs by Boni (Ridwan Ghani), though all of his medicines are destroyed in the scuffle. Impressed by his selfless care for the villagers, Nadia mistakenly believes Boni is a doctor. Touched by his kindness, she gifts him her late brother's unused car. Their bond deepens when Nadia chooses Boni's village as the subject for her university thesis.

programme.title: Usia 2 Bulan Udah Jadi Apa? Jadi-an
programme.desc: Yogi’s (Ridho Illahi) life brightens up with the arrival of a new PE teacher, Wina (Nabila Zavira). He is captivated when she tells him, 'True strength doesn't just come from the body, but from a strong mind and heart.' However, Yogi’s admiration turns to heartbreak when he discovers Wina has given her heart to someone else.

programme.desc: 韩国最帅的两位男士洪锡天和焕熙请打扫狂兄弟帮他们洗车，看到他们的车后打扫狂兄弟大吃一惊。

programme.desc: 白范四处搜寻马吉子的尸体，与此同时，各路人马在山中追捕赵汉秀，逐渐逼近他。

programme.title: 打扫狂BRIAN
programme.desc: 韩国最帅的两位男士洪锡天和焕熙请打扫狂兄弟帮他们洗车，看到他们的车后打扫狂兄弟大吃一惊。

programme.title: 亲切的善珠
programme.desc: 善珠和昭遇故意惹尚雅和南镇嫉妒。美珠想办法给善珠找假老公。

programme.title: 衣袖红色镶边
programme.desc: 在东宫的书库里，德任遇到了一位陌生男子，而她向世子道歉却屡屡失败。

programme.title: 模范计程车3
programme.desc: 曾是计程车司机的吴某，遭遇计程车牌照诈骗，现寻求帮助。道奇和他的团队为他展开了一项新的任务。

programme.title: 善德女王
programme.desc: 天明前往伊西郡，告诉德曼让她忘了新罗，跟庾信一起离开，过上作为普通人的生活。

programme.title: 检法男女 2
programme.desc: 白范四处搜寻马吉子的尸体，与此同时，各路人马在山中追捕赵汉秀，逐渐逼近他。

programme.title: 衣袖红色镶边
programme.desc: 在东宫的书库里，德任遇到了一位陌生男子，而她向世子道歉却屡屡失败。

programme.title: 奇迹的兄弟
programme.desc: 一位满怀抱负的作家与一名能读懂人心的神秘男孩建立起友谊后, 共同开始了一段寻找真相的旅程。

programme.title: 张宝利来了
programme.desc: 玉秀送来一条烧毁的裙子，暗示仁荷曾经做过的事。敏静求智尚原谅她，但是他拒绝了。

programme.title: 善德女王
programme.desc: 天明前往伊西郡，告诉德曼让她忘了新罗，跟庾信一起离开，过上作为普通人的生活。

programme.title: 检法男女 2
programme.desc: 白范四处搜寻马吉子的尸体，与此同时，各路人马在山中追捕赵汉秀，逐渐逼近他。

programme.title: 亲切的善珠
programme.desc: 宇相终于与美珠的家人见面。尚雅与昭遇对峙，善珠越来越在意昭遇。

programme.title: 模范计程车3
programme.desc: 曾是计程车司机的吴某，遭遇计程车牌照诈骗，现寻求帮助。道奇和他的团队为他展开了一项新的任务。

programme.title: 张宝利来了
programme.desc: 玉秀送来一条烧毁的裙子，暗示仁荷曾经做过的事。敏静求智尚原谅她，但是他拒绝了。

programme.title: 衣袖红色镶边
programme.desc: 一只老虎袭击了王宫，让宫女们的庆典陷入了混乱。德任协助疏散，祘负责狩猎老虎。

programme.title: 模范计程车3
programme.desc: 为了引诱骗子，道奇摆出一副容易上当的样子，买下了车炳镇推荐的每一辆车，令车炳镇感到震惊。

programme.title: 检法男女 2
programme.desc: 赵汉秀的身份曝光后，引发了混乱。葛大铁很高兴，而白范发现了新的证据。

programme.title: Running Man
programme.desc: 你不容错过的韩国综艺节目! 每集里, 主持群将与来宾们接受不同的挑战, 并淘汰对方, 成为最后的优胜者。

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 味想天开
programme.desc: 大唐盛世，丁一山因拥有「金舌头」成为「地狱食评家」，与名厨盖兆天亦敌亦友，还同时爱上爽朗胡姬石柔，遂互斗厨艺，「味」分高下……一山无意间发现自己身世，原来生父含冤而死，兆天父子也有嫌疑，如何为父雪冤？

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: How New Magnets Could Power the Future
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Can Living Human Brain Cells Power AI?
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: The Big Business of Drilling Deep Into the Earth
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Why Money Is Flowing Into Geoengineering
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: How Flying Cars Became a Billion-Dollar Bet
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Why a Lunar Ecosystem Could Be Worth Billions
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: A Dangerous Corner of the Global Shipping Industry
programme.desc: The sinking of the Gulf Livestock 1 was the worst disaster in the history of the live-export trade, an industry made up of about 150 ships with a market value totaling $20 billion to $30 billion.

programme.title: The Hidden Cost of South Sudan's Oil Boom
programme.desc: South Sudan relies on oil for almost all of its revenue. But some communities living near the oil fields allege polluted water is causing birth defects and miscarriages, raising questions over health and responsibility.

programme.title: Tesla's Dangerous Doors
programme.desc: A number of fatal car crashes involving Tesla vehicles has prompted increased scrutiny of its electric doors, triggering lawsuits over whether the design can leave passengers trapped.

programme.title: How China Is Building an Army of Hackers
programme.desc: China and the US actively engage in cyber espionage for strategic advantage. Leaked files now suggest how rapidly Beijing is catching up in preparation for any future conflict.

programme.title: Inside the Deaths That Rocked India's Relations With the West
programme.desc: This is the story of how two alleged murder plots involving Sikh activists brought India, the US and Canada to a diplomatic crisis.

programme.title: The Deadly Quest for Gold in South Africa
programme.desc: Gold built South Africa, but mining kills some who dig for it. In Stilfontein, a disaster that trapped miners underground reveals how a quest for gold became a story of hunger, survival and death.

programme.title: The Scandal That Rocked the Philippines
programme.desc: A police raid in a small town in the Philippines revealed a young mayor's alleged connections to a $2 billion Singapore money laundering scandal and Chinese espionage.

programme.title: The Zombie Debts Making Wall Street Rich

programme.title: Bloomberg BusinessWeek
programme.desc: Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec bring together the latest news from the world of business and finance by harnessing the power of Bloomberg Businessweek reporters and editors.

programme.title: The Race to Challenge China's EV Lead
programme.desc: Chinese companies dominate the EV battery supply chain and are expanding rapidly outside their home market. Meanwhile, competitors are looking to new chemistries to leapfrog the leading tech.

programme.title: How New Magnets Could Power the Future
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Can Living Human Brain Cells Power AI?
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: The Big Business of Drilling Deep Into the Earth
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Why Money Is Flowing Into Geoengineering
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: How Flying Cars Became a Billion-Dollar Bet
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Why a Lunar Ecosystem Could Be Worth Billions
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Willow Bay Sees Opportunity in Angel City FC
programme.desc: Alex Rodriguez and Jason Kelly talk with USC Annenberg School for Communication and Journalism Dean Willow Bay about her investment in Angel City Football Club and her tenure on "NBA Inside Stuff."

programme.title: From Football to Finance with Justin Tuck
programme.desc: Super Bowl winner and Goldman Sachs Managing Director Justin Tuck talks about the pressure of playing in New York and his transition from football to finance.

programme.title: How Magic Johnson Built a Business Empire
programme.desc: The hosts sit with Magic Johnson to discuss how he was able to make the transition from being a legendary basketball player to a successful businessman.

programme.title: How Jerry Jones Built a Cowboys Empire
programme.desc: How Jerry Jones Built a Cowboys Empire. Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones speaks on risk-taking, making bold trades and the Main Street philosophy that fuelled his rise with the Cowboys.

programme.title: How Emmanuel Acho Reinvents Himself
programme.desc: The hosts talk with Emmanuel Acho about his reinvention from NFL linebacker to media leader, his show "Uncomfortable Conversations" and his new effort, "Speakeasy."

programme.title: Protect
programme.desc: Protect. How can we be optimistic in 2025? As Nikolaj Coster-Waldau begins season two, we're reminded of the delicate balance between human progress and protecting our planet.

programme.title: Rethink
programme.desc: Waste is a significant contributor to global warming, but turning it into a resource can help curb emissions and shrink humanity's environmental footprint.

programme.title: Invent
programme.desc: From transforming concrete into a carbon sink to mining nickel from genetically enhanced plants, we meet the bold inventors preserving and adapting to nature's offerings to help humanity thrive.

programme.title: Energize
programme.desc: Meeting humanity's insatiable demand for energy while still curbing greenhouse emissions will require creative solutions both big and small.

programme.title: Alexander Stubb, President of Finland
programme.desc: Francine visits Finland, where the threat from Russia looms large. She speaks to President Alexander Stubb about Finnish resilience and how his country is preparing for an uncertain future.

programme.title: Ray Dalio, Founder of Bridgewater Associates
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua meets Ray Dalio on OceanX in the port of Nice for the UN Ocean Conference. They speak about radical transparency, building and leaving one of the largest hedge funds and what's next.

programme.title: How to Run Your Family's $1.6 Trillion Empire
programme.desc: Francine Lacqua talks with Franklin Templeton CEO Jenny Johnson about how to steer a $1.6 trillion business amid the rise of AI, shifting politics and booming private markets.

programme.title: Theresa May and the Brutality of Politics
programme.desc: Former UK Prime Minister Theresa May speaks with Francine Lacqua about Vladimir Putin, and her approach to leadership in a world seeing a rise in "strongmen."

programme.title: Inside Europe's Economic Crises With Christine Lagarde
programme.desc: Bloomberg's award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Ajay Banga on India, Migration and a Youth Jobs Time Bomb
programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, we sit down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas.

programme.title: Bloomberg Surveillance Radio
programme.desc: The economy and the markets are "under surveillance" as we cover the latest in finance, economics and investment. Join Tom Keene, Paul Sweeney, Lisa Mateo, Michael Barr and other guests.

programme.title: Bloomberg Intelligence
programme.desc: Bloomberg's Alix Steel and Paul Sweeney harness the power of Bloomberg Intelligence to provide in-depth research and data on more than 2,000 companies and 130 industries.

programme.title: iStage An Intervention
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game. Sam tricks Freddie into believing that he's being plagued by bad luck when he refuses to forward a 'chain email'.

programme.title: The Birthweek Song
programme.desc: Tori struggles to find the perfect birthday gift for Trina, then decides to write her sister a song as a present. An ungrateful Trina turns the song into cash by selling it, enraging Tori.

programme.title: #NewGoat
programme.desc: Sam and Cat babysit a Pygmy goat while trying to win over Dilben, their landlord's obnoxious son who is trying to get the girls evicted. Dice begins managing Goomer, a huge but dim-witted MMA fighter.

programme.title: Raph Thinks It Through
programme.desc: Raph's strength won't save him when he's caught between the Mechazoids and the notorious street gang known as Purple Dragons! Raph's going to have to use his head to get out of this one!

programme.title: Donnie Hangs Tough
programme.desc: It's a battle of the wits between Donnie and Bishop as he races through NYC's subway system to stop her evil Mechazoids. But how do you beat an AI that counters your every move?

programme.title: Plankton's Intern / Patrick's Tantrum
programme.desc: Plankton needs help stealing the formula, so he hires an intern who knows more about Mr. Krabs than anyone. // Patrick goes into a destructive fit whenever he hears a bell, so his friends help him in their own ways.

programme.title: Bubble Bass's Tab / Kooky Cooks
programme.desc: Bubble Bass avoids paying his bill at the Krusty Krab, so SpongeBob and Squidward are sent to collect the cash. // Mr. Krabs makes Spongebob and Squidward cook a fancy meal for Mrs. Puff, but every dish becomes a dispute.

programme.title: Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: Funny Money / Shaking Bad
programme.desc: When Best breaks the last clean plate, rather than do the dishes, Best and Bester head out to buy a brand new one. // Best and Bester decide to make the best milkshake ever, only to find themselves in a bitter contest with Flip Flop.

programme.title: Pulling Power / Home Security
programme.desc: Best wins a competition to pitch his story ideas to world famous author A N Other, and finds that three's a crowd. // Best and Bester housesit for Diamondo and realise that there's more to it than massage chairs and unlimited snacks.

programme.title: The Drooling Fool / Patrick's Got An Alien Zoo Loose
programme.desc: Patrick's uncontrollable drooling gets out of hand and mouth. // A shape-shifting alien runs loose in the Star home.

programme.title: The Patterfly Effect / A Space Affair to Remember
programme.desc: Patrick messes with the space-time continuum. // While Cecil and Bunny celebrate their anniversary in outer space, Patrick and Squidina throw a house party.

programme.title: Mind the Gap / Dirty Bubble Returns
programme.desc: Squidward closes the gap in SpongeBob's teeth, which causes a dramatic and unexpected change in his demeanor. // The newly reformed "Clean Bubble" takes a dishwashing job at the Krusty Krab, where he is tempted by the grime.

programme.title: MermaidPants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob & Patrick play Mermaidman and Barnacleboy, it's all fun and games until their sworn enemies arrive!

programme.title: She's All Splat
programme.desc: With Cherry working at Splat by Sea, Max ropes her into a fake dating scheme to score partner discounts at the restaurant. Chloe faces a tough choice between winning a trivia competition or supporting her brother Billy when he wants to join her team.

programme.title: Dude, Where's My Man Buggy?
programme.desc: When Danger Force borrows Ray's beloved Man Buggy without permission it falls into the hands of criminals Stupid Jeff and The Toddler. Now the team must track it down and get it back before Ray finds out.

programme.title: The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: Kid Danger reveals to Captain Man that he doesn't want to be stuck in Swellview and be his sidekick forever. To make matters worse, Kid Danger is recruited by another town to be their hero.

programme.title: Fandom Pains / Rita Her Rights
programme.desc: Lucy is annoyed that Lori and Leni have started watching her vampire show because of a cute new character. // After getting community service for racking up tickets, Mom finds it's more relaxing than being at home.

programme.title: Pet Project / Cuff Break
programme.desc: When Mom and the twins win a raffle to spend a weekend at a resort, Lana struggles to leave her pets behind. // After Lincoln tests a magic trick on Grouse, they get handcuffed together and Grouse has to spend the day at middle school.

programme.title: Friday Night Fights
programme.desc: Lisa joins Lynn's football team as the analytics coach to prove that math will always beat out heart.

programme.title: SquidBird / Allergy Attack!
programme.desc: Squidward gets left with a mess when SpongeBob and Patrick use carrier clams to send messages to each other. // After cooking his kazillionth Krabby Patty, SpongeBob believes he's developed an allergy to them.

programme.title: Big Top Flop / Sandy, Help Us!
programme.desc: When the circus comes to town and steals his customers away, Mr. Krabs tries to sabotage the show. // Sandy spends the day solving everyone's issues, only to return home to her own monster of a problem.

programme.title: Bad Luck Bob
programme.desc: SpongeBob experiences a bad luck streak when his lucky tie clip suddenly goes missing.

programme.title: Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: The Fun Bucket / The Patrick Show After Dark
programme.desc: The Stars celebrate Patrick's birthday at the Chum Bucket. // Patrick and Squidina explore Bikini Bottom late at night.

programme.title: Who's the Dummy Now?
programme.desc: A family of dummies move into the Star home.

programme.title: Future Tense / Lynner Takes All
programme.desc: When Mom and Dad meet an impressive family they worry their kids aren't doing enough to ensure successful futures. // Tired of Lynn's poor sportsmanship during board games, the siblings decide to team up to take her down.

programme.title: Yes Man / Friend or Faux
programme.desc: The sisters enlist the "Master of Convincing" (AKA Lincoln) to teach them how to ask Mom and Dad for money. // Lisa gets her report card and finds she's failed 'social skills'. To bring up her grade, she must make a friend.

programme.title: No Laughing Matter / No Spoilers
programme.desc: When Luan overhears her siblings complaining about her comedy, she decides to give it up. // Knowing Leni's history of spoiling surprises, the kids don't tell her about Mom's upcoming party.

programme.title: Legends / Mall of Duty
programme.desc: Dad and Lincoln get on "Legends of the Hidden Temple" and can't wait to for a whole day of father/son bonding. // Lincoln wants to go to the mall but has to watch his younger sisters so he decides to take them to the mall.

programme.title: Prison Break / Canyon Valley Film Festival
programme.desc: When Jack and Lil are grounded by Will and Min, who are then grounded by Halmoni, the family team up to escape their punishment. // Canyon Valley hosts a festival and Jack's excited to enter, until the pressure to deliver a masterpiece gets to him.

programme.title: Meats of Strength
programme.desc: Jack's new friend Beef invites him to a sleepover. Jack, a sleepover newb, freaks out over impressing his new friend.

programme.title: Food Con Castaways / Snail Mail
programme.desc: The gang heads to a food convention, but things go awry when they become stranded in the woods. // SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going!

programme.title: Insecurity Guards
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: Absent Minded / Be Stella My Heart
programme.desc: Clyde discovers he didn't earn junior administrator job. But can he give up the perks that come along with it? // When the new girl starts hanging around Lincoln and his friends, they begin to suspect she likes one of them.

programme.title: Sitting Bull / The Spies Who Love Me
programme.desc: The older sisters reluctantly let Lynn into their babysitting club but she quickly proves to be too aggressive. // Ronnie Anne wants to go downtown. But her grandparents think it's too dangerous, so they decide to spy on her.

programme.title: Hero Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: When Lynn's friend Margo is celebrated for a one-ina-million soccer goal, Lynn has to try and be supportive.

programme.title: J-LAD / Big Honey
programme.desc: LAD has a sleepover and in an effort to join in, Jack ends up making a promise that turns their night upside down. // When Will's parents visit Canyon Valley, news of the sale of their bee farm sends the family into a big, honey-inheritance spiral.

programme.title: I Know What You Did This Summer
programme.desc: Max learns that Phoebe is working with Captain Perfect, and sets out to uncover the secret he is keeping. Chloe's crush invites her to a product launch party at Splat By The Sea, at the same time Jinx and Booch want her to protest outside the party.

programme.title: Stuck In Two Holes
programme.desc: Whaaaat?!? Captain Man and Kid Danger are each stuck in a hole?!? Charlotte and Jasper better go help, 'cuz Schwoz is takin' a bean bath!

programme.title: iSaw Him First
programme.desc: When Carly and Sam show interest in the same boy, they vow to not let him come between them. This turns out to be more difficult than they imagined and soon their friendship is tested as they compete for his attention.

programme.title: The Bird Scene
programme.desc: Tori goes all out to master an iconic Hollywood Arts monologue in Sikowitz's class. Meanwhile, Andre and Robbie join a ballet class to meet girls with disastrous results.

programme.title: The Packer Packer Bowl
programme.desc: Bacon becomes the West Packer High football mascot, but when the school's rival steals him as part of a prank, Lay Lay will stop at nothing to get her beloved pig back.

programme.title: Along Came a Sister / Chore and Peace
programme.desc: Lincoln is given the responsibility of taking home his classes' tarantula, but it gets loose and wreaks havoc! // Thinking he has the worst chores, Lincoln decides to go on strike until someone will swap chores with him.

programme.title: For Bros About to Rock / It's a Loud, Loud, Loud, Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert, and Luna is determined to make it the greatest experience ever. // Lincoln finds a letter in the attic leading him to believe there is money hidden within the Loud house!

programme.title: Caught Rubber - Handed / And...Action!
programme.desc: Chuck moves in with the Wylde-Paks after Lil & Jack accidentally destroy his house. They must hide his awful roommate habits from their parents. // Seeking closure on her favorite K-Drama, Lily films her own finale with her family as the cast & crew.

programme.title: Sammy Suckerfish / Big League Bob
programme.desc: SpongeBob meets a magical fish. // SpongeBob cooks in the big leagues.

programme.title: The Patrick Show Cashes In / The Star Games
programme.desc: In this ad-packed variety episode, The Patrick Show sells merchandise in order to fund its second season. // Patrick forces his entire family to participate in a series of different game show challenges.

programme.title: Bunny the Barbarian
programme.desc: Bunny goes on a mid-day adventure to a forgotten age.

programme.title: Bummer Camp / Sleepstakes
programme.desc: When Gramps struggles to run Camp Mastadon, the kids come to his rescue. //The Loud kids help Lana get over her fear of sleepovers.

programme.title: Intern for the Worse / The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. // When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: J-LAD / Big Honey
programme.desc: LAD has a sleepover and in an effort to join in, Jack ends up making a promise that turns their night upside down. // When Will's parents visit Canyon Valley, news of the sale of their bee farm sends the family into a big, honey-inheritance spiral.

programme.title: The Real Woori World / The Collector
programme.desc: Min tries to avoid the usual Woori World chaos, but when the family splits up they all get lost in their own fiascos. // Jack's mission to find the rare DVD sequel of his favorite movie leads him to the mysterious Collector.

programme.title: Patrick! The Game / The Sewers of Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: Patrick invents a new board game, and invites SpongeBob, Sandy and Squidward to play it with him. // After accidentally flushing Mr. Krabs' safe, SpongeBob and Squidward must go into the sewers to find it.

programme.title: Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: Tales of Woe
programme.desc: When Stella's music box disappears at school, the gang immediately suspects the Rat Beast, a student urban legend.

programme.title: Bummer Camp / Sleepstakes
programme.desc: When Gramps struggles to run Camp Mastadon, the kids come to his rescue. //The Loud kids help Lana get over her fear of sleepovers.

programme.title: Intern for the Worse / The Old and the Restless
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Lincoln and Clyde both get an internship at Flip's and compete to win the manager title. // When Lincoln sees how tame Pop Pop has gotten in his older age, he takes him out for a day to remember.

programme.title: Europe Road Trip: A Bite of Transylvania
programme.desc: When the Louds' bus gets a flat tire, they're invited to stay the night in a spooky couple's mysterious castle.

programme.title: The Packer Packer Bowl
programme.desc: Bacon becomes the West Packer High football mascot, but when the school's rival steals him as part of a prank, Lay Lay will stop at nothing to get her beloved pig back.

programme.title: For Your Spies Only
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe attend Parent-Teacher Night, leaving Chloe and friends home without adult supervision. When Jinx finds the Air Lair, he believes spies are targeting the school, and his meddling puts the Thundermans' school jobs at risk.

programme.title: Captain Drex
programme.desc: Captain Man's old sidekick and nemesis, Drex, returns from the past with an army of cavemen to finish off Captain Man once and for all. Kid Danger may be the only one who can save Captain Man now.

programme.title: A Finata Full Of Death Bugs
programme.desc: When a dangerous pinata ends up at a kid's birthday party, Kid Danger and Captain Man must go undercover and step in before it's too late.

programme.title: Jack the Clipper
programme.desc: When a mysterious new barber attacks Swellview with a string of terrible haircuts, it's up to Danger Force to uncover their identity before their own hair gets chopped

programme.title: iHurt Lewbert
programme.desc: A 'Messing With Lewbert' sketch goes horribly awry, injuring Carly's obnoxious doorman. The gang nurses him back to health until Freddie's mother steps in and takes over. When a romance starts to blossom they have to stop it.

programme.title: iPie
programme.desc: When Carly, Sam, and Spencer bring Freddie to their favorite pie shop, they learn that its proprietor has passed away. Worse more, it appears that his recipes may be lost forever.

programme.title: Robarazzi
programme.desc: Tori suggests Robbie capture videos of students' everyday lives to increase his blog traffic, but when the camera is turned on Tori, she asks him to stop. Only Robbie doesn't and Tori realizes she's created a monster.

programme.title: #PeezyB
programme.desc: Sam gets a job as the assistant to the huge rap star Peezy B. Cat finds babysitting much more challenging without Sam around to help.

programme.title: Bishop Makes Her Move
programme.desc: The origin of the woman called BISHOP! Why does she hate mutants? What is the secret of the Mechazoids? And exactly what happened the night the Turtles fell into Bishop's trap?

programme.title: Night Of The Mechazoids
programme.desc: The Turtles take the fight to Bishop but she's ready for them... get ready for MECHA-BIHSOP! But when the Mechazoids go out of control, can the Turtles save humanity?

programme.title: Krusty Koncessionaires / Dream Hoppers
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab crew goes to a big concert to sell krabby patties in the stands. // SpongeBob explores the melodious dreamscapes of his sleeping neighbors.

programme.title: A Place for Pets / Lockdown for Love
programme.desc: When customers bring pets into the Krusty Krab, Mr. Krabs soon realizes pets are more profitable than owners. // Plankton ruins another date with Karen, so she puts the Chum Bucket on lockdown until he proves his affection.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: One Better Day - Part 1 / One Better Day - Part 2
programme.desc: Bettervale is celebrating "Better Day" but Best and Bester manage to anger the townsfolk by causing mischief again. // After a period of exile Best and Bester return hoping to patch things up with their neighbours and with each other.

programme.title: Cactus Sitting / Disaster of Hole 2
programme.desc: The twins take a cactus called Pricklebutt to the beach and end up mounting a dramatic search and rescue mission. // Best and Bester won't let Grumpy Pants' round of golf stop them from catching the finale of their favourite show.

programme.title: Home Ecch! / Fun & Done!
programme.desc: Squidina hosts a television show to pass a home economics class. // Patrick and SpongeBob try to unlock a dull child's imagination.

programme.title: Little Patscals / The Pre-Historic Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick learns what GrandPat's childhood was like. // Cave Pat hosts a show with his cave family.

programme.title: Jolly Lodgers / Biddy Sitting
programme.desc: Squidward packs his bags after his house gets infested, but a different kind of pest waits at his hotel. // SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: Whirlybrains
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get hooked on the latest fad - flying your own brain like a tiny drone!

programme.title: Krampapalooza
programme.desc: Danger Force sees an opportunity to make money fast by hosting Swellview's hottest music festival, but they catch a case of the Kramps when Krampus threatens to ruin their plans.

programme.title: Captain Drex
programme.desc: Captain Man's old sidekick and nemesis, Drex, returns from the past with an army of cavemen to finish off Captain Man once and for all. Kid Danger may be the only one who can save Captain Man now.

programme.title: Prom-Com / Scene Steeler
programme.desc: When Leni is put in charge of the school's prom, she is determined to make it the most memorable night ever. // Lincoln and Clyde cast Luan as the villain, Bee Trayal, in their David Steele film and have to deal with her method acting.

programme.title: Leaving The Dadan Family For Good_! The Kids' Hideout Has Been Built!
programme.desc: Luffy faces the greatest battle yet, as pirates and marines clash in a war that will reshape the era.

programme.desc: Luffy faces the greatest battle yet, as pirates and marines clash in a war that will reshape the era.

programme.desc: Amid a bustling yet enjoyable period, Makoto returns to work with Shiki. At Rotsgard Academy, Shifu and Yuno Rembrandt resume classes and attend a lecture with new transfer student Karen.

programme.desc: It has been a year since Tohru's mother passed away. At her part time job, Momiji tells Tohru about his family.

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】以珈、丽雪等仍在丧亲的哀伤中，一妍已经要收起伤悲，面对正向明塱集团猛扑过来的一场狙击风暴！一妍私自拉拢高官莫康尧换取明塱医疗城投标顺利，也尝试拉拢副院长英杰。进涛的四女王启心收到消息，赶到医院，确定进涛已经脑死亡，决定拔喉，却遭一妍阻止！结果事情闹大，消息外泄！

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 白露试图通过送演兵棋试探彧修明对真师的了解。同时，她发现七海伶计划混入星瀚大典刺杀彧修明，尽管白露尝试劝阻，七海伶仍坚持行动。白露求助翼无忧，希望他帮助七海伶逃生。在星瀚大典前夕，彧修明召见白露并试探她对七海伶刺杀计划的了解。白露获得翼无忧提供的凌霄焰火，为即将到来的大典做准备。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 黑色月光
programme.desc: 危机公关余满月为客户摆平桃色纠纷，却勾起昔日一段可怕往事……建筑发展商「宝鐷建设」股价大跌，集团主席蒋哲贤急召开股东大会稳定人心；人称「股坛狙击手」的成风到场捣乱，满月及时为哲贤解围，在哲贤心中留下好印象。满月巧施妙计，成功争取接手蒋家的公关事务，说服哲贤着令儿子蒋基俊回港。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】追思会上，永成突然现身，宣告他已得到其他股东支持，将召开特别董事会重选成员与集团主席。一妍要阻止永成进董事会，就要有足够股权送自己入局，于是想拉拢以珈、丽雪。一妍看准丽雪对启智的感情以作游说，惟握有最多股权的以珈，坚决表明不参与。进涛亡妻的姐姐万秀琳成一妍最后可拉拢之人，她亲往澳门拜访秀琳，秀琳却突然心脏病发。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 七海伶等人混入禁军，试图在星瀚大典上刺杀彧修明，但被早有准备的彧修明困住。叶凌霜使用凌霄火焰通知翼无忧前来救援，最终成功帮助七海伶逃脱，但叶凌霜被捕。彧修明质问界诸婴并试探其对七海伶的感情。七海伶为救叶凌霜回大牢而被捕，界诸婴为其求情并被迫封印了七海伶的星辰力。

programme.title: The Xpose
programme.desc: Rival actresses Zara and Chandni clash publicly. When Zara is found dead, Chandni becomes the main suspect until journalist Ravi tries to uncover the shocking truth. Release Year: 2014 Director: Anant Mahadevan

programme.title: Aitraaz
programme.desc: Raj Malhotra is falsely accused of sexual harassment by his boss's wife, leading to a tense courtroom battle to prove his innocence. Release Year: 2004 Director: Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla,Mastan Alibhai Burmawalla Awards: Best Editing: HuSSain A. Burmawala, Best Sound Recording: Rakesh Ranjan, Best Sound Re-Recording: Anup Dev Awards of the International Indian Film Academy; Best Actor in a Villainous Role: Priyanka Chopra Filmfare Awards

programme.title: Mili
programme.desc: Mili dreams of Canada but gets trapped inside a freezer. Alone and freezing, she must survive the night using hope, strength, and her will to live. Release Year: 2022 Director: Mathukutty Xavier

programme.title: Double Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four lazy friends dream of real estate riches but are cheated by Kabir, pushing them to chase him down and reclaim their lost pride and money. Release Year: 2011 Director: Indra Kumar Awards: 2012 Winner Popular Award- Best Comic Actor- Riteish Deshmukh

programme.title: Dhadak
programme.desc: Madhu and Parthavi's love rises above social status, but their families oppose strongly. Left with no choice, they elope, with Parthavi's father and brother in hot pursuit. Release Year: 2018 Director: Shashank Khaitan

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Khiladi
programme.desc: A slacker must impress a wealthy man to marry her daughter. Release Year: 1997 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Chatrapathi
programme.desc: Shivaji and his family are uprooted from their community in Sri Lanka and wind up as bonded labourers in Visakhapatnam. The situation worsens when his jealous stepbrother enters his life. Release Year: 2023 Director: V. V. Vinayak

programme.title: 1920 London
programme.desc: After her husband becomes possessed by an evil spirit, a noble woman turns to her former lover to perform an exorcism. Release Year: 2016 Director: Tinu Suresh Desai

programme.title: Payback
programme.desc: It is payback time as one man embarks on a personal war against the syndicate.

programme.title: The Bikeriders
programme.desc: The Bikeriders chronicles the story of The Vandals, a fictional motorcycle club that transforms into a more sinister gang over the course of a decade.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to find and recruit a team of meta humans to stand against a newly awakened threat.

programme.title: 乔太守乱点鸳鸯谱
programme.desc: 孙玉郎与刘慧娘，裴政与徐雅本是两对情投意合的恋人，阴差阳错间，孙玉郎男扮女装代姐拜堂，刘慧娘则代兄娶妻。他们的婚约误配，让成误会，终闹上公堂，乔太守将错就错，干脆来了一个乱点，结果正好有情人终成眷属，皆大欢喜。

programme.title: 无法无天飞车党
programme.desc: 文员郭静中，偕妻子陈美娟、妹嘉莉，乘搭渡轮往离岛渡假。同船而往者，有喜以飞车寻求刺激的「飞车党」；此次前往离岛，所有飞仔都各自带备一部电单车。「飞车党」之首叫尊尼，是个冷酷青年。其弟米高爱闯祸捣乱，亦是「飞车党」之一员。米高在船上见到性感的嘉莉，竟出手调戏......

programme.title: 多情剑客无情剑
programme.desc: 李寻欢是一个风流多情的剑客，却已退出江湖，十年来过着平淡的生活。因梅花盗重现江湖，他重回阔别十年之故园兴云庄。然而，当李寻欢回到兴云庄后，却发现早已物是人非。

programme.title: 断肠剑
programme.desc: 李岳为报父仇暗杀高官后遭通缉，隐姓埋名成为逃犯。他的未婚妻贞儿委托暗恋她的剑客方君兆寻找爱郎，却不知女盗贼小眉早已对李岳暗生情愫。他们错综复杂的爱情四角关系展现出无悔的割舍、付出与无私而伟大的情感。

programme.title: 弟子也疯狂
programme.desc: 方世玉、洪熙官与胡惠干三位俗家弟子初入少林，拜于南院戒嗔大师门下习武。然而，三人常与出家弟子悟清较劲切磋，寺中从此喧嚷不绝，连方丈见此情景亦不免啼笑皆非。

programme.title: 楚留香
programme.desc: 某天，侠盗楚留香欢宴好友无花和尚，神水宫的宫南燕突然来到，指称楚盗去神水宫的天一神水，且用以毒杀多人。在楚留香极力否认下，宫南燕表示他需于一个月内找出真凶，否则必将置其于死地。楚留香为证明自身清白，决意着手调查此事件...

programme.title: 三十年细说从头
programme.desc: 大导演李翰祥改编自己大受欢迎的专栏，尽现电影圈光怪陆离的趣事及传闻，由爱将刘永和戴良纯扮演不同角色，保证令你捧腹大笑。

programme.title: 猎魔者
programme.desc: 巨富之女贺盈聘请罗力到柬埔寨，从杀手乃汶处夺回商业秘密录音带。罗与好友组织一支敢死队，直赴游击队基地，成功将录音带交到贺手上后，方发现背后原来有极大的密秘...

programme.title: 斗气小神仙
programme.desc: 丁安安与雍晴两个表姐妹自小就读于同一所女校，因二人的母亲一向口和心不和，从小就向自己女儿灌输好胜思想，因此形成安安与晴从小斗到大，三日一小吵，五日一大斗。她们在校中认识了男同学米高及保罗，很快成为情侣，两对小冤家后来因斗气竟然互调了男朋友...

programme.title: 射雕英雄传第三集
programme.desc: 郭靖和黄蓉为探寻武穆遗书而前往铁掌山。铁掌帮帮主裘千仞发现二人行踪后，把黄蓉打至重伤，但黄蓉的伤势却只有南帝段智兴才能治好。究竟黄蓉能否及时就医？

programme.title: 猎人
programme.desc: 花花公子周国雄有一本「猎人日记」专门去记录他四出猎艳的故事，周丢弃刘明华，又去追猎吕绮美，刘突然遭人杀死。后来周又去追求女学生朱丽珍...但当晚，吕遭杀死，警方向周追查。同时周想到和他亲近的女人，一个一个的被杀死，嫌凶渐指向他，好像有人在陷害自己。周开始追查真相。

programme.title: 少林子弟
programme.desc: 明末明将吴三桂卖国降清引狼入室，大明江山亦为满清所并，举国有气节之士无不感悲愤。少林子弟纷纷下山，串联各地好汉抗清复明；清官招降纳叛，广收武当、峨嵋派的江湖败类，勾结地方恶霸，向少林子弟赶尽杀绝，洪、方、胡等处在重重危机险恶之中...

programme.title: 军阀趣史
programme.desc: 此片可谓李翰祥导演，经典作《大军阀》之延续，焦点在几位当时得令的艳星，余莎莉、邵音音及楚湘云。片中「艳趣」特别多...

programme.title: Smallfoot
programme.desc: The Bigfoot legend is turned upside down when a bright young Yeti finds something he thought didn't exist-a human.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In this sixth chapter of the horror franchise, a new family moves into Katie and Kristi's former house and discovers an evil presence that begins to terrorise their lives.

programme.title: Margot At The Wedding
programme.desc: An unflinchingly honest story of a family in distress. Stars Nicole Kidman and Jack Black.
